---
title: "Jonas Schuck"
image: "../../img/jonas.jpg"
abstract: "PhD Student"
page-layout: custom
date: 11-01-2023
about:
  template: trestles
comments: false
format:
  html:
    css: style.scss
---


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-5}
\
\


<div class="vertical-line">
</div>

<div  class="content">

  <img src="../../img/jonas.jpg" alt="Avatar"> 

  <center>
  <a class="button-linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonas-schuck-9b519a220/" role="button"><i class="bi-linkedin"></i> Jonas Schuck</a>
  <a class="button-github" href="https://github.com/Jonas-Schuck" role="button"><i class="bi-github"></i> jonas-schuck</a>
  <a class="button-mail" role="button"><i class="bi-envelope"></i> schuck|med.uni-frankfurt.de</a>
  </center>
  
</div>

:::


::: {.g-col-5}

<p>&emsp;</p>

# Jonas Schuck

## Research
**PhD Student, Neurologisches Institut (Edinger Institut)**, Universitätsklinikum Frankfurt, Germany

## Education
**Master of Science in Bioinformatics**, Goethe University Frankfurt \
**Bachelor of Science in Applied Bioinformatics**, Technische Hochschule Bingen

:::

:::
